plugins.name: review-suite
plugins.description: Bundled review and diagram playgrounds: /plan-review, /architecture-review, /architecture-map, /code-diagram, and a standalone /devserver launcher. Single install with one shared devserver binary and PTY bridge for session-resumed feedback delivery.

plugins.name: plan-review
plugins.description: [DEPRECATED — migrate to review-suite] Interactive HTML review playgrounds for implementation plans. Section-by-section approve/revise/question controls and a Send-to-Claude button that drives a live Claude Code session via an embedded terminal.

plugins.name: architecture-review
plugins.description: [DEPRECATED — migrate to review-suite] Interactive before/after component diagrams for architecture reviews. Draggable node graph with per-node comment pins, saved layouts, and a Send-to-Claude button that drives a live Claude Code session via an embedded terminal.

plugins.name: architecture-map
plugins.description: [DEPRECATED — migrate to review-suite] Interactive architecture concept-map playground. Chat-seeded draggable node graph with layered filters, per-node insights, saved named layouts, per-node feedback pins, and a Send-to-Claude button that drives a live Claude Code session via an embedded terminal.
